component.name: PDF Direct Viewer
component.summary: A modern, eye-friendly PDF Viewer for the Linux desktop

description.p: PDF Direct Viewer is a standalone desktop PDF viewer that focuses on reading comfort. It features a built-in Reader Mode that allows you to change the PDF's background and text colors to reduce eye strain, especially useful for reading at night.

Developed by Daniel Lee, this application seamlessly wraps Mozilla's HTML5 PDF.js engine in a native GTK interface. The core reader-mode theme logic is based on the excellent open-source work by Shiva Prasad (doqment).
